title: Indeedee-M Battle Guide
summary: A doubles [support] [Psychic]/[Normal] that auto-sets [psychic]-terrain on entry and empowers [expanding-force] for spread damage.
strengths: Terrain shuts down all priority for five turns
[expanding-force] becomes a 120 BP spread nuke under terrain
weaknesses: Base 95 Speed under[cut]s real top-tier sweepers

recommendedMoves.reason: Boosts an ally's attack by 1.5x for burst turns

recommendedItems.reason: Guarantees the entry turn goes through

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Indeedee-M is a [Psychic]/[Normal] doubles [support] with the 60/65/55/105/95/95 line of a fragile caster. Its entire value in Champions MA comes from [psychic-surge] — one switch-in sets [Psychic] Terrain for five turns, denying every priority move in the tier and boosting the whole team's [Psychic] attacks by 30%.

## Strengths
Unlike most terrain setters, Indeedee-M actually contributes damage on its own — base 105 SpA with [expanding-force] under its own terrain hits for 120 BP spread. That turns a single click into half a kill on both opposing slots. [helping-hand] chains into any special attacker behind it, and base 95 Speed is fast enough to click terrain before most mid-tier threats move. [psychic]-terrain also shuts down [shadow-sneak], [sucker-punch], [fake-out], and [extreme-speed] — a meta-wide denial effect.

## Weaknesses & Answers
[Psychic]/[Normal] takes 2x from [Dark], [Ghost], and [Bug], and Indeedee-M's 60/55 physical bulk means any [knock-off] ends the terrain early. Meowscarada and Kingambit both run through it without resistance, and Dragapult outspeeds and deletes with [shadow-ball]. A second issue: [psychic]-terrain also blocks your own priority, so you cannot run a [fake-out] lead beside it.

## Recommended Moveset
[expanding-force] is the locked STAB — the entire build exists to click this under terrain. [hyper-voice] is the spread [Normal] STAB that ignores [substitute]. [dazzling-gleam] is coverage for [Dark] answers and a second spread move for [protect]-heavy doubles games. The last slot is [helping-hand] for pure [support] tempo; in singles, swap it for [psyshock] to beat bulky special walls.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[focus-sash] is the premium item because it guarantees Indeedee-M survives the turn it needs to set terrain. [twisted-spoon] is the alternative if the team already has another terrain setter backup and you want maximum [expanding-force] damage. The ability is locked to [psychic-surge]. Tera [Fairy] flips the [Dark] matchup into resistance, and Tera [Psychic] pushes [expanding-force] numbers even higher for burst-kill plays.

## Teammates & Synergy
Indeedee-M should lead beside a special attacker that abuses the terrain — Hatterene, Gardevoir, Armarouge, or any [Psychic]-type wallbreaker. [Fairy] and [Fighting] partners cover [Dark] threats, and a Trick Room backup keeps the sweep going once [Psychic] Terrain expires. Avoid [fake-out] leads on the same team — [psychic]-terrain blocks them.

## Play Patterns
Always lead Indeedee-M. Click the STAB turn one, stack [helping-hand] turn two to nuke a slot with a partner, then start swapping to Tera the moment a [Dark] move is telegraphed. Do not bring Indeedee-M back in on low HP — priority from Sucker Punch users like Kingambit still gets denied by terrain, but one direct hit still removes it.
